description: Bestiary legendaries (Phase 39). Source: docs/bestiary-catalog.md §4. Fixed named beasts unlocked by an objective milestone — highest kind priority. SLICE 1 ships SESSION-COUNT milestones only (sessionCount). Cumulative-tonnage + first-S-rank legendaries are Slice 2 (no client source threaded yet — see WIP boundary inventory GAPS). sessionCount = the sagaNumber (current finished-workout count) that triggers the legendary.
